steps.name: When  I add "Palace Bookshelf" account from welcomeScreen
And  I search for "The Ragged Edge" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button and cancel downloading by click CANCEL button on book detail screen
Then  I check that book contains DOWNLOAD action button on book details screen
steps.statusMessage: Button 'Download' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) -
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Button 'Download' is not present on book details screen. Error (if present) - 
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.BookDetailsSteps.checkThatBookContainsActionButton(BookDetailsSteps.java:113)
	at ✽.I check that book contains DOWNLOAD action button on book details screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/Distributors.feature:182)

steps.name: And  I check that book contains DELETE action button on book details screen
